channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fuel Prices Ease Slightly but High Costs Continue to Affect Airfare and Power Rates
item.description: The latest fuel price tracker as of April 23 shows that while there has been a recent rollback in pump prices, the broader impact of high oil costs continues to affect other sectors such as air travel...

item.title: US and Iran escalate maritime standoff in the Strait of Hormuz amid competing blockade strategies
item.description: The article examines the intensifying maritime confrontation between the United States and Iran in the Strait of Hormuz, where both powers are attempting to demonstrate the effectiveness of their resp...

item.title: Ranchers Bees Secure NPFL Promotion After 16-Year Absence
item.description: Ranchers Bees don finally secure their return to the Nigeria Professional Football League (NPFL) after spending 16 years outside the top flight. The Kaduna-based club finished top of the Nigeria Natio...

item.title: Pakistan’s Role as an Intermediary in Global Geopolitics from the Cold War to Today
item.description: The article examines Pakistan’s long-standing role as a strategic intermediary in international diplomacy, arguing that its military establishment has turned the country into a “bridge actor” between ...

item.title: Korean Atomic Bomb Survivors Seek Recognition and Compensation Through U.S. Tour
item.description: A group of first- and second-generation Korean survivors of the Hiroshima and Nagasaki atomic bombings has launched a speaking tour across the United States from April 21 to May 3. The initiative aims...

item.title: Police investigate deaths of Downtown Santa Monica nonprofit director and his wife in Venice home
item.description: Authorities in Los Angeles are investigating the deaths of a Santa Monica nonprofit official and his wife after both were found with fatal gunshot wounds inside their Venice home. The Los Angeles Poli...

item.title: Global markets react as Iran keeps Strait of Hormuz closed amid stalled US talks
item.description: Global financial markets showed mixed reactions as tension between the United States and Iran continue without any clear sign of fresh peace talks. Asian stock markets mostly dropped, while oil prices...

item.title: Father kills 11-year-old son at Nevada airport before dying by suicide as investigation continues
item.description: A 37-year-old man, Giovanni Perez, fatally shot his 11-year-old son, Callan, inside a bathroom at Elko Regional Airport in Nevada on 13 April before taking his own life shortly afterwards. The pair ha...

item.title: Naqvi discusses Pakistan’s diplomatic role and US-Iran talks with US envoy
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi held an important meeting with US Charge d’Affaires Natalie Baker where both sides exchanged detailed views on the ongoing diplomatic developments related to the second ...

item.title: Karnataka SSLC 2026 Results Released on DigiLocker
item.description: The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) has declared the SSLC Class 10 results for 2026, making them available primarily through the DigiLocker platform for over 8 lakh students ...

item.title: Moderna proceeds with bird flu mRNA vaccine trial despite loss of federal funding
item.description: Moderna has announced the launch of a large-scale clinical trial for a new mRNA-based vaccine designed to protect humans against bird flu, even after the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (...

item.title: Early voter turnout remains low in Baramati and Rahuri Assembly bypolls in Maharashtra
item.description: Polling for the Assembly by-elections in Maharashtra’s Baramati and Rahuri constituencies began at 7 a.m. on April 23, 2026, with relatively low voter turnout reported in the initial hours. According ...

item.title: Practical ways to make your garden more wildlife-friendly this spring
item.description: The article encourages gardeners to rethink traditional tidy gardening practices and instead prioritise wildlife-friendly approaches that support biodiversity. It highlights how leaving natural debris...

item.title: AI-powered table tennis robot demonstrates advanced competitive performance

item.title: B.C. Premier David Eby says Tumbler Ridge mass shooting investigation is in final stages
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby has announced that the police investigation into the Tumbler Ridge mass shooting has entered its final stages. The update was provided during a meeting with Tumbler ...

item.title: Cabinet divisions grow over Keir Starmer’s dismissal of senior civil servant Olly Robbins amid Mandelson vetting controversy
item.description: Tensions have surfaced within Keir Starmer’s cabinet following his decision to dismiss senior Foreign Office civil servant Olly Robbins in connection with the escalating Peter Mandelson vetting scanda...

item.title: Akor Adams hail more Nigerians for LaLiga as e enjoy standout season with Sevilla
item.description: Sevilla FC striker and Nigeria international Akor Adams don talk say im dey very happy with di growing number of Naija players wey dey feature for Spanish LaLiga. During one media chat, di 26-year-old...

item.title: Ranchers Bees FC Secure Promotion to NPFL After Strong Season
item.description: Ranchers Bees FC of Kaduna don officially secure promotion to the Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) after dem perform well for the Nigeria National League (NNL) season. The club finish among the ...

item.title: Ducks rally late to defeat Oilers and level first-round playoff series
item.description: The Anaheim Ducks defeated the Edmonton Oilers 6-4 on Wednesday night in Game 2 of their first-round playoff series, evening the matchup at one game apiece. Cutter Gauthier played a decisive role, sco...
